[vm_name].json.vmPath: [comment:relative path from vm data path to vm file path]
[vm_name].json.vmHostName: [comment:vm server name defined by cloud init]
[vm_name].json.osType: [comment:linux or other supported os, we currently only support linux]
[vm_name].json.osVariant: [comment: ubuntu24.04 or other value specified in request]
[vm_name].json.defaultPWD: [comment:default password for login to syste as ubuntu]

[disk_id_or_name].json.imagePath: [comment:relative path from vm data path to vm image file path]
[disk_id_or_name].json.baseImagePath: [comment:relative path from vm data path to base image path]

[interface_to_bridge_id].json.useDHCP4: [comment: bool value, if assigned ip in data file false, else]
